debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ Set ↑A ∼ ↑(𝒫 A)

proof:
by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro S
    rcases S with ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    rcases hS with ⟨X, hX⟩
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX
successful_attempts:
by
  let f : Set A → 𝒫 A := fun X => ⟨val_image A X, by
    rw [← range_val_image A]
    exists X⟩
  exists f
  constructor
  · intros X1 X2 h
    apply val_image_one_one A
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val h
  · intro S
    rcases S with ⟨S, hS⟩
    rw [← range_val_image A] at hS
    rcases hS with ⟨X, hX⟩
    exists X
    apply Subtype.ext
    exact hX
